title: sorbus rufoferruginea
intro: Sorbus rufoferruginea, also known as the Copper-leaved Whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the mountain ranges of the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Sorbus rufoferruginea is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
